sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: JPMORGAN CHASE & CO의 공시 핵심을 한국어로 요약했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 비이자비용 26,850이 늘었지만 세전이익 20,479에서 순이익 16,494로 마감해 비용 상승을 일정 부분 상쇄했다.
CET1 291 billion, SLR 5.6%가 제시돼 자본 완충 속에서 실적 개선이 이뤄진 구간임을 보여준다.

riskChanges.text: 비수행자산이 100억 달러로 10% 상승해 신용위험 모니터링 포인트가 커졌다.
증가 원인으로 소비자 비적채권 확대(2025년 1월 캘리포니아 산불 영향, 2025년 2분기부터 시작된 forbearance)와 CIB 공정가치 대출 확대가 함께 언급됐다.
포워딩 진술은 공시일 기준이며, 이후 10-K/10-Q/8-K에서의 업데이트를 함께 봐야 향후 전망의 유효성을 판단할 수 있다.

businessChanges.text: 투자은행 수수료는 28억 5,800만 달러로 31% 증가해, CIB 자문수수료 강화가 실적 모멘텀의 핵심 축으로 작동했다.
카드 소득은 11억 9,000만 달러로 전년 12억 1,600만 달러 대비 약세를 보였고, 그 반면 비이자수익은 244억 7,000만 달러로 유지됐다.
비이자비용 내에서 보상 15,339이 큰 비중을 차지해 인건비 구조가 향후 마진 민감도 관리 포인트가 된다.

watchItems.text: 비수행자산 100억 달러의 추가 확대와 대손충당금 25억 700만 달러의 추이를 함께 보아야 하며, 신용비용이 안정적이더라도 향후 충당 조정 속도가 변동성 변수로 작용할 수 있다.
카드 11억 9,000만 달러의 둔화와 투자은행 28억 5,800만 달러의 반등이 공존해 수익 다변화가 한쪽 라인 의존으로 이동하지 않는지, 동시에 HQLA 9,410억 달러 기반 유동성 완충이 유지되는지를 병행 점검할 필요가 있다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: Quarter ended 2026-03-31 net income = 164억 9,400만 달러 (USD 16.494B; 16,494 million), XBRL range 2026-01-01..2026-03-31.
Quarter ended 2026-03-31 total assets = 4조 9,004억 7,500만 달러 (USD 4900.475B; 4,900,475 million), XBRL range instant..2026-03-31.

Q1 2026 card income was $1,190 (11억 9,000만 달러) versus $1,216 (12억 1,600만 달러), noninterest revenue was $24,470 (244억 7,000만 달러), provision for credit losses was $2,507 (25억 700만 달러), compensation expense was $15,339 (153억 3,900만 달러), total noninterest expense was $26,850, income before taxes was $20,479, and net income was $16,494.

Management’s discussion and analysis of the financial condition and results of operations (“MD&A”) of JPMorgan Chase & Co. (“JPMorganChase” or the “Firm”) for the first quarter of 2026. This Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q for the first quarter of 2026 (“Form 10-Q”) should be read together with JPMorganChase’s Annual Report on Form 10-K for the year ended December 31, 2025 (“2025 Form 10-K”). Refer to the Glossary of terms and acronyms and line of business metrics on pages 170-178 for definitions of terms and acronyms used throughout this Form 10-Q. This Form 10-Q contains forward-looking statements within the meaning of the Private Securities Litigation Reform Act of 1995. These forward-looking statements are based on the current beliefs and expectations of JPMorganChase’s management, speak only as of the date of this Form 10-Q and are subject to significant risks and uncertainties. Refer

Results of Operations and Consolidated Balance Sheets Analysis on pages 9-11 and pages 12-13, respectively, for a further discussion of the Firm's results, including the provision for credit losses. Pre-provision profit, ROTCE, TCE, TBVPS, NII and NIR excluding Markets, and total net revenue on a managed basis are non-GAAP financial measures. Refer to Explanation and Reconciliation of the Firm’s Use of Non-GAAP Financial Measures on pages 15-16 for a further discussion of each of these measures. • The Firm’s nonperforming assets totaled $10.0 billion at March 31, 2026 , up 10%, driven by: – higher consumer nonaccrual loans, predominantly due to the impact of the wildfires in California in January 2025, which resulted in forbearance activities starting in the second quarter of 2025, as well as higher loans at fair value in CIB, and – higher wholesale nonaccrual loans, reflecting net downg Readable Korean unit: 100억 달러.

Liquidity Risk Management on pages 41-47 for additional information. Selected capital and other metrics • CET1 capital was $291 billion, and the Standardized and Advanced CET1 ratios were 14.3% and 14.1%, respectively. • SLR was 5.6%. • TBVPS grew 8%, ending the first quarter of 2026 at $108.87. • As of March 31, 2026 , the Firm had eligible end-of-period High Quality Liquid Assets (“HQLA”) of approximately $941 billion and unencumbered marketable securities with a fair value of approximately $565 billion, resulting in approximately $1.5 trillion of liquidity sources. Revenue table, dollars in millions. Q1 2026 investment banking fees were $2,858 (28억 5,800만 달러), up 31% from $2,178. Card income was $1,190 (11억 9,000만 달러) versus $1,216 (12억 1,600만 달러), noninterest revenue was $24,470 (244억 7,000만 달러), net interest income was $25,366, and total net revenue was $49,836, up 10%. Operating lease income was $1.2 billion (12억 달러) versus $829 million (8억 2,900만 달러).
